2025-05-11T23:19:00.CONTENT_EN: The slow lane of Tseung Kwan O Road (Tseung Kwan O Tunnel bound) near Junk Bay Road Substation which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic.

2025-05-12T01:24:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Cross Harbour Tunnel (Ho Man Tin bound) near The Hong Kong Polytechnic University, which was closed due to malfunction of traffic light, are re-opened to all traffic. The traffic light at the road section concerned has resumed normal.

2025-05-12T07:59:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Lung Cheung Road (Kwun Tong bound) near Tin Ma Court is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.

2025-05-12T08:28:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Lung Cheung Road (Kwun Tong bound) near Tin Ma Court which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic. Traffic queue takes time to disperse.
2025-05-12T08:28:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的龍翔道(往觀塘方向)近天馬苑的部份行車線現已解封。 車龍有待消散。

2025-05-12T08:11:00.CONTENT_EN:
The following road sections are busy:
– Lei Yue Mun Road (Eastern Harbour Crossing bound) near Sceneway Garden
– Kai Tin Road (Eastern Harbour Crossing bound)
Motorists passing through the above road sections are advised to drive with utmost care and patience.
2025-05-12T08:11:00.CONTENT_CN:
以下路段的交通繁忙:

Due to road works, the slow lane of Wai Yip Street (Mong Kok bound) near Kwun Tong Public Pier is closed to all traffic. 
Only remaining lanes are available to motorists.   Traffic is busy now.
2025-05-12T18:12:00.CONTENT_CN:

駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。  現時上址交通繁忙。

Only remaining lanes are available to motorists.   Traffic queue on Wai Yip Street (Mong Kok bound) ends at Kwun Tong Bypass (Yau Tong bound) near MegaBox.   Traffic is congested now.
2025-05-12T18:34:00.CONTENT_CN:
因道路工程，偉業街(往旺角方向)近觀塘公衆碼頭的慢線仍然封閉。

2025-05-12T18:22:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to fire , all lanes of Des Voeux Road West (Kennedy Town bound) near Water Street are closed to all traffic. Motorists are advised to use alternative routes. Traffic is busy now.
2025-05-12T18:22:00.CONTENT_CN: 因火警，德輔道西(往堅尼地城方向)近水街的全線現已封閉。 駕駛人士請考慮改用其他道路。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2025-05-12T18:26:00.CONTENT_EN:
Due to fire , all lanes of Des Voeux Road West (Kennedy Town bound) near Water Street are closed to all traffic. 
At the same time, the westbound tram service from Water Street to Hill Road is suspended ; The eastbound tram service from Hill Road to Queen Street is suspended.   Motorists are advised to use alternative routes.   Traffic is busy now.
2025-05-12T18:26:00.CONTENT_CN:
因火警，德輔道西(往堅尼地城方向)近水街的全線現已封閉。
同時，由水街⾄山道之間的西⾏線電⾞服務暫停;由山道⾄皇后街之間的東⾏線電⾞服務暫停。  駕駛人士請考慮改用其他道路。  現時上址交通繁忙。
